name: io.github.zcag/tela
description: Self-hostable team wiki; agents read & write it via MCP; Atlas turns your repo into a cited wiki.

environmentVariables.name: TELA_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Origin of the Tela instance the proxy connects to, e.g. https://tla.portalos.ru

environmentVariables.name: TELA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Personal access token (tela_pat_...), forwarded as Authorization: Bearer. Create one in Settings -> API Keys.
